problem_text_cn: 1434 空气密度的测量。环境条件下的空气，被橡皮塞密封于玻璃瓶容器（小针剂药瓶）中，可利用医用针筒抽出容器中的空气，随抽吸次数的增加，瓶中压强将逐渐降低。若忽略针筒抽吸过程中及抽吸后橡皮塞的漏气，试拟订一个测量方案，测出环境条件下，密封于容器中空气的密度，并要求测量的系统误差（不确定度）控制在 3% 以内。[可供仪器和用具] 橡皮塞密封的玻璃容器（其体积$V_0 = 312\ \mathrm{cm^3}$）、医用针筒（30 cm³）、物理天平和砝码、密封用粘胶带、20 cm × 25 cm作图纸。[要求] (1) 写出测量原理和所依据的测量公式。(2) 记录测量数据，求出测量结果。(3) 阐明系统误差（不确定度）小于 3% 的理由。
problem_text_en: 1434 Measurement of air density. Air under ambient conditions is sealed in a glass bottle container (small injection vial) with a rubber stopper. A medical syringe can be used to extract air from the container, and the pressure in the bottle will gradually decrease as the number of extractions increases. If air leakage during syringe extraction and after extraction through the rubber stopper is ignored, formulate a measurement scheme to measure the density of air sealed in the container under ambient conditions, and require the systematic error (uncertainty) of the measurement to be controlled within 3%. [Available instruments and tools] Glass bottle container sealed with a rubber stopper (volume $V_0 = 312\ \mathrm{cm^3}$), medical syringe (30 cm³), physical balance and weights, sealing tape, 20 cm × 25 cm graph paper. [Requirements] (1) Write down the measurement principle and the measurement formula on which it is based. (2) Record the measurement data and find the measurement result. (3) Explain why the systematic error (uncertainty) is less than 3%.
img_cn: 图1434_1：空气密度测量原理推导过程
图1434_2：空气密度测量数据及线性拟合结果
img_en: Fig. 1434_1: Derivation process of air density measurement principle
Fig. 1434_2: Air density measurement data and linear fitting results
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】利用理想气体状态方程$p_0V_0 = \frac{M_0}{\mu}RT_0$，多次抽气后$\frac{p_n}{p_0} = \left(\frac{V_0}{V_0+V_c}\right)^n = \frac{M_n}{M_0}$，得$\Delta M_n = M_0\left[1 - \left(\frac{V_0}{V_0+V_c}\right)^n\right]$。将$\Delta M_n$与$1 - \left(\frac{V_0}{V_0+V_c}\right)^n$线性拟合求斜率$M_0$，空气密度$\rho_0 = \frac{M_0}{V_0}$。代入数据$V_0 = 312\ \mathrm{cm^3}$，$V_c = 30.0\ \mathrm{cm^3}$，拟合得$M_0 = 363 \times 10^{-3}\ \mathrm{g}$，故$\rho = 1.16 \times 10^{-3}\ \mathrm{g/cm^3}$。线性拟合消除了残余气体误差，系统误差 < 3%。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Using the ideal gas state equation $p_0V_0 = \frac{M_0}{\mu}RT_0$, after multiple extractions $\frac{p_n}{p_0} = \left(\frac{V_0}{V_0+V_c}\right)^n = \frac{M_n}{M_0}$, we get $\Delta M_n = M_0\left[1 - \left(\frac{V_0}{V_0+V_c}\right)^n\right]$. Linear fit $\Delta M_n$ vs $1 - \left(\frac{V_0}{V_0+V_c}\right)^n$ to find the slope $M_0$, and air density $\rho_0 = \frac{M_0}{V_0}$. Substituting data $V_0 = 312\ \mathrm{cm^3}$, $V_c = 30.0\ \mathrm{cm^3}$, fitting gives $M_0 = 363 \times 10^{-3}\ \mathrm{g}$, so $\rho = 1.16 \times 10^{-3}\ \mathrm{g/cm^3}$. Linear fitting eliminates residual gas error, systematic error < 3%.
problem_answer: 空气密度：$\boldsymbol{1.16 \times 10^{-3}\ \mathrm{g/cm^3}}$；测量关键：线性拟合求$M_0$，消除残余气体误差，系统误差 < 3%。
